title: Putham Pudhu Kaalai Lyrics Alaigal Oivathillai
stanzas:
Putham Pudhu Kaalai Song Lyrics Alaigal Oivathillai
#Ilaiyaraja #SJanaki #GangaiAmaran

Putham pudhu kaalai
ponnira velai
en vazhvile
dhina thorum thondrum
sugam raagam kaetkum

ilam poovai
nenjil thondrum
adhu thaan thaazhamo
manadhil aasaigal
malarin kolangal

Putham pudhu kaalai
ponnira velai
en vazhvile

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song?

The song Putham Pudhu Kaalai conveys themes of love and the beauty of new beginnings, evoking a sense of nostalgia.

What is the context of this song in the movie?

In Alaigal Oivathillai, the song reflects the emotional journey of the characters, highlighting their romantic moments.

Who is the singer of this song?

The song is beautifully sung by S. Janaki, known for her expressive voice and emotive singing style.

Who composed the music for this song?

The music for Putham Pudhu Kaalai was composed by the legendary Ilaiyaraaja, a pioneer in Tamil film music.

When was this song released?

This classic song was released on July 18, 1981, and continues to be cherished by fans.
enrichedMetadata.summary: In Putham Pudhu Kaalai, the song encapsulates the beauty of love and the joy of new beginnings. Set against the backdrop of Alaigal Oivathillai, it evokes feelings of nostalgia and warmth, making it a perfect fit for romantic occasions. The soothing melody, paired with S. Janaki's heartfelt vocals, creates an emotional experience that resonates deeply with listeners. This timeless classic remains a beloved piece in Tamil cinema, celebrating love in its purest form.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Putham Pudhu Kaalai from Alaigal Oivathillai is a timeless melody that captures the essence of love and nostalgia. With the enchanting voice of S. Janaki and the masterful composition by Ilaiyaraaja, this song resonates with anyone who cherishes beautiful moments. Experience the soothing vibes that make this classic a must-listen for every romantic occasion.
stanzaMeanings: Every new morning brings good work in my life, and every day brings happiness and joy that I can hear, always filled with bliss.
Every new morning brings good work.
The fragrance that arises from flowers is the melody itself.
The young flower blooms in my heart, that is the essence of my desires and dreams blooming in my mind.
The sounds of the night bring various feelings and emotions.
Every new morning brings good work.
In the sky, a beautiful form appears, who created it?
In the cool breeze that blows, who has joined in happiness?
In the thoughts that arise with age, joy grows, music sings, and flavors increase.
Every new morning brings good work in my life, and every day brings happiness and joy that I can hear, always filled with bliss.
